message:
fix(core): qualifier-aware ORDER BY resolution for ambiguous column names

ORDER BY with qualified column references (e.g. ORDER BY c.name, p.name)
previously resolved to the first matching column name regardless of table
qualifier.  When multiple tables share a column name, this caused
incorrect sort order.

Both sort_rows_by_order_terms and extra_order_exprs detection now compare
the table qualifier when present.

Also adds 8 new conformance oracle tests: scalar subqueries, INSERT
SELECT advanced, sequential DML, aggregate empty/null, type affinity,
schema changes, complex joins, recursive CTE advanced.

Core: 1681 pass, 0 fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
